title: Theocracy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Theocracy''' was a system of government run by religious leaders and based on religious fundamentals. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nazzri]], home to the [[Nazzar/Legends|Nazzar]] [[Species/Legends|species]], was ruled by a theocratic [[oligarchy]] during the time leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. The [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] was a theocracy.

Those involved in the [[Anti-Sith conspiracy]] saw the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] theocracy beneath [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Later, during [[Operation Shadow Hand]], the cloned Palpatine intended to turn the Empire into a dark-side theocracy in fact.

==Appearances==
